## Suggested Commands
```bash
grep -rE 'DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=[a-zA-Z0-9]+' .
grep -rE 'OPENAI_API_KEY=[a-zA-Z0-9]+' .
```

- Potential for false negatives in secret detection if the pattern is not fixed.
